pageDescription: A themed page about furry foxes, shark furries, and hybrid creature vibes.

banner.title: The furry scene is colorful, loud, social, creative, and way bigger than one style.
banner.text: This convention group shot is the visual anchor for the page now, and it fits the community side of the tab way better than the old placeholder state.

intro.title: Fox furries, shark furries, and why hybrids hit so hard.
intro.text: This page is less about direct profile info and more about the creature side of the site. It works like a themed note page or mini essay collection.
